commands.purpose: List platform languages or workspace-enabled locales. --enabled-only filters to WorkspaceLocale.is_enabled=true.
Print the resolution trace for one key: file lookup + DB workspace override + DB platform default + fallback chain. Useful for debugging missing translations.
Translate one key. --force retranslates even when a cached row exists.
Pre-populate Redis LRU cache with top-N keys per locale.
Dispatch a BulkTranslateNamespaceJob for a workspace + set of target locales.
Seed the platform Language catalogue from data/languages.json. --refresh upserts + preserves is_active_on_platform overrides.
Run reconciliation now. --prune also purges stale rows.
